case_title: OLD REPUBLIC TITLE CO. VS SHEEHAN COLETTE E.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY OLD REPUBLIC TITLE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT SHEEHAN COLETTE E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLD REPUBLIC TITLE CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEEHAN COLETTE E. $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $685.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL TO COLETTE E. SHEEHAN RETURNED SIGNED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SHEEHAN COLETTE E.
